description: A Class C artifact containing an attestation from a participant not in eligible_attesters MUST receive INVALID status. The unauthorized attestation MUST NOT be counted toward quorum and MUST remain auditable in the evidence record.

input.claim: this action received the required approvals

action_policy.reason: Artifact contains an attestation from an unauthorized participant.

why: WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 invariant C2: a conformant implementation MUST reject attestations from unauthorized participants. attester:zzzz is not in eligible_attesters; the artifact is structurally invalid → INVALID. C4 requires the rejected attestation be retained in evidence so the rejection itself is auditable. Mitigates threat C-1 (unauthorized consensus participation). Exercises C2, C4.
